title: Lead SEO Specialist at Delhivery Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Delhivery Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled SEO Specialist looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Ventures Solutions in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
